title: VerbNode Schema (spatial node registry for verb-field NPCs)
description: Canonical JSON-Schema for a single VerbNode entry — the 'furniture' NPCs orbit to satisfy verbs (rest, social, errands, duty, eat). Consumed by tools/validate-verb-nodes.js and (future) the BO-V verb-node stamper (DOC-110 P3 Ch.2). Runtime shape is documented in engine/verb-nodes.js.

floorId.description: Dotted depth path (CLAUDE.md §Floor hierarchy). 'N' = exterior, 'N.N' = interior, 'N.N.N' = nested dungeon.

nodeType.description: Controls which verbs this node satisfies. See engine/verb-nodes.js header for full vocabulary.

faction.description: Optional — when set, only NPCs of this faction satisfy faction_post verbs here.

id.description: Unique stable identifier. Convention: `{floorContext}_{role}[_{index}]` (e.g. promenade_bonfire, lantern_cot_a).

contested.description: Act 2 — both factions claim this node. Escalates NPC behaviour when set.
